case_title: UNITED PARCEL SERVICE VS PRINGIE STEPHEN PATRICK DBA BEHIND THE POST OFFICE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINGIE STEPHEN PATRICK DBA BEHIND THE POST OFFICE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PRINGIE STEPHEN PATRICK DBA BEHIND THE POST OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $921.84 FILED BY UNITED PARCEL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRINGIE STEPHEN PATRICK DBA BEHIND THE POST OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED PARCEL SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINGIE STEPHEN PATRICK DBA BEHIND THE POST OFFICE $921.84 PRINCIPAL, $49.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $971.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
